channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Céline Dion to Return to the Stage This Fall in Paris, Her First Headlining Shows in Six Years
item.description: 🎤 Céline Dion is back on stage in Paris this fall! Get ready for an unforgettable musical experience! 🌟 #CelineDion #MusicNews

item.title: Billy Joel’s The 100th: Live at Madison Square Garden (The Complete Concert) Coming to Blu-ray and DVD
item.description: 🎶 Get ready to experience the magic of Billy Joel's historic 100th show live at Madison Square Garden in the comfort of your own home! 🎹✨ #BillyJoel #MusicMagic

item.title: Disclosure Share Video for New Song “The Sun Comes Up Tremendous”
item.description: 🌞 Let's dance into the weekend with @disclosure's groovy new video for “The Sun Comes Up Tremendous”! 🕺🎶 #Disclosure #NewMusicVibes

item.title: Guns N’ Roses Give Two Songs Their Live Debuts at 2026 World Tour Kickoff: Video + Setlist
item.description: 🎸🔥 Rock legends Guns N' Roses surprise fans with debut performances! Check out the epic setlist and videos now! #GunsNRoses #RockAndRollIcons 🤘

item.title: Blackpink’s Lisa Books First K-Pop Vegas Residency
item.description: 🎤 Lisa taking over Vegas! Blackpink's leading lady scores epic K-pop residency! Let's dance under those neon lights! 💃 #Blackpink #KpopQueen

item.title: Joni Mitchell Accepts Lifetime Achievement Juno, Sings With Sarah McLachlan & Allison Russell
item.description: 🌟 Legends unite! Joni Mitchell shines at Junos, serenading with Sarah McLachlan and Allison Russell. 🎶✨ #MusicLegends #JunoAwards

item.title: Bob Dylan Joins Patreon With Historical Fanfic
item.description: 🎸 Bob Dylan writing fanfic? Count us in! Patreon just got a whole lot cooler! 🌟 #MusicNews #BobDylan #FanficGenius

item.title: Garbage Cover The Cure At Robert Smith’s Teenage Cancer Trust Benefit
item.description: Rocking out for a cause! 🌟 Garbage brings their unique twist to The Cure at Robert Smith’s Teenage Cancer Trust Benefit! 🎶 #MusicForACause #Garbage #TheCure

item.title: Watch Wolf Alice Perform on Saturday Night Live UK
item.description: 🎸 Rocking the SNL UK stage! Don't miss Wolf Alice's killer performance! 🤘 #WolfAlice #SNLUK #RockOn

item.title: Benson Boone Bakes Up ‘Wanted Man’ Arena Tour
item.description: 🎸 Benson Boone is hitting the road with his sizzling 'Wanted Man' Arena Tour! Who's ready to rock out with him? 🔥🎶 #BensonBooneOnTour

item.description: 🎶 The Boss brings the heat at No Kings Rally with 'Streets of Minneapolis'! 🔥 Rock on, Bruce! #BruceSpringsteen #NoKingsRally 🎸

item.description: Step into a world of pure imagination at Barbie Dream Fest! 🌟🎶 Let the music magic take you on a sweet adventure! 🍭 #BarbieDreamFest

item.description: Chvrches rocked the stage with their killer new track “Conman” at the Teenage Cancer Trust Benefit! 🎶✨ #Chvrches #NewMusic

item.title: Pitbull Plans to Replace Childhood Home With Mr. 305 Headquarters

item.title: Watch Sudan Archives Cover Sade For XMU
item.description: 🎻 Sudan Archives puts her unique spin on a Sade classic for XMU! Let's vibe to this soulful cover together! 🔥 #MusicNews #SadeCover

item.title: The Veronicas Cover Sombr’s ’12 to 12′ for triple j’s ‘Like A Version’
item.description: 🎶 The Veronicas bring a fresh twist to Sombr's '12 to 12' on triple j's 'Like A Version'! Hit play and feel the vibes 🎤 #MusicCoverMagic

item.title: Harry Styles Brings ‘Kiss All The Time’ Home With Manchester One Night Only Show: 7 Best Moments
